name: Win the love of your girlfriend's mother
description:
Your girlfriend is probably the prettiest girl in your class at university but now she wants you to meet her mother. How will you deal with her strong character? Are you enough for her daughter?

(Message: I guess this is a netori I'm not familiar with the terms yet, change the original story. Anyway good day)
